docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED.
SEE REGISTER OF ACTION (BOOK) PRIOR TO FEB 22 1993
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TODAY'S MATERNITY WARNER, GERALDINE WARNER, JOHN G AS TO PLAINTIFF DE VILLALVILLA, ALEXANDER DIAZ DE VILLAVILLA, SUZETTE Z. LAGNADO
